events.event_description: First U.S. Ambassador to Palau presented credentials. Ambassador was nonresident, based in Manila.

evidence.quote: Thomas C Hubbard, Ambassador Extraordinary and Plenipotentiary. Appointed: 1996-07-02. Credentials presented: 1996-12-06. Left Manila 2000-07-24.

events.event_description: Ambassador Reed presented credentials and left 'post' (not Manila), suggesting a transition to a resident embassy in Palau.

evidence.quote: Rowe Helen Patricia Reed, Ambassador Extraordinary and Plenipotentiary. Appointed: 2010-08-09. Credentials presented: 2010-09-30. Left post on 2013-07-26.
